sources.label: Anthropic Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 official release
sources.collectionStatus: stale-retained; refresh blocked: TimeoutError
sources.note: Anthropic release table for Claude Mythos 5 / Fable 5. Reported Mythos and Fable scores are within 1-3 percentage points unless starred; the table shows the higher score of the two, and starred rows can differ more because Fable falls back to Opus 4.8 for some cyber and biology requests.

sources.label: Kimi K3 official release evaluations
sources.collectionStatus: refreshed

Kimi K3 uses max reasoning; comparator scores mix KimiCode, Claude Code, Codex, and cited official leaderboards as documented in the page footnotes, so harness-sensitive rows should not be treated as pure model-only tests.
